channel.title: Astro Sidey
channel.description: A minimal, content-focused Astro theme for personal sites.

item.title: Customizing Sidey
item.description: How to customize Sidey's layouts, appearance, and behavior to fit your needs.

item.title: Contributing to Sidey
item.description: How to report bugs, request features, and get involved in making Sidey better.

item.title: Using Expressive Code
item.description: Syntax highlighting, line numbers, collapsible sections, and everything Expressive Code offers in Sidey.

item.title: Using MDX
item.description: What MDX unlocks in Sidey and how to use components inside your markdown content.

item.title: Understanding Content Structure
item.description: How your folders and files in src/content map directly to URLs on your site.

item.title: Getting Started
item.description: Everything you need to install Sidey, configure your site, and publish your first page.
